nodes.text:
Patient reports mucous discharge, intermittent abdominal discomfort, reduced appetite and bloating for 4 weeks. Additional symptoms include night sweats. Past medical history significant for type 2 diabetes.

CT TAP on 15/07/2024: descending colon mural thickening, inflammatory vs neoplastic; no distant disease.
